1: According unto the multitude of thy tender mercies blot out my transgressions.
2: And cleanse me from my sin.
3: And my sin is is ever before me.
4: That thou mightest be justified when thou speakest, and and be clear when thou judgest.
5: And in sin did my mother conceive me.
6: And in the hidden part part thou shalt make me to know wisdom.
7: Wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow.
8: That That the bones which which thou hast broken may rejoice.
9: And blot out all mine iniquities.
10: And renew a right spirit within me.
11: And take not thy holy spirit from me.
12: And uphold me with thy with thy free spirit.
13: And sinners shall be converted unto thee.
14: And And my tongue shall sing aloud of thy righteousness.
15: And my mouth shall shew forth thy praise.
16: Thou delightest not in burnt offering.
17: A broken and a contrite heart, O God, thou wilt not despise.
18: Build thou the walls of Jerusalem.
19: Then shall they offer bullocks upon thine altar.
